name: PromoRepublic
description:
What PromoRepublic Does

PromoRepublic is a comprehensive and multi-purpose white-labeled social media marketing platform. It’s ideal for many types of users, from small businesses to marketers, agencies, and multi-location companies. The platform takes a unique, data-driven approach to helping businesses grow their online visibility. 

PromoRepublic’s white-label social media management tools are a practical tool for agencies who need to customize their service delivery.

Key Features

PromoRepublic has white-label as well as other features: 

  • Comprehensive White Label social media management features
    • Customized and branded reports, emails, and dashboards, all accessible on your website. 
    • All-in-one White Label interface for collaborating with your clients and team members.
    • Library of ready-to-use content with editable templates for 20 industries. 
    • Built-in Graphics Editor
    • Single-Sign-On that streamlines your access to multiple accounts across different platforms.
    • White label mobile apps - iOS and Android support for managing social activities on the go.
  • Efficiently manage social media posting at scale.
  • AI-driven post scheduling and promotion across all networks. 
  • All-in-one social inbox for managing interactions across multiple platforms on one spot.
  • Mobile Apps: iOS and Android support for managing “on-the-go”.

Benefits of PromoRepublic

Users on the PromoRepublic platform have the following benefits: 

‍

  • White-label social media management advantages: 
    • Use white label features to: 
      • Customize and brand reports and dashboards
      • Brand your emails.
    •  Interact with clients through a white-labeled interface.
    • Customize ready-to-use content from the content library or create social media posts from scratch with the built-in graphics editor. 
    • Single-Sign-On streamlines access to client accounts across multiple social platforms 
  • Efficiently manage social media posting at scale.
  • Save time by scheduling your posts ahead with the social media calendar.

Pricing

PromoRepublic offers three plans: 

  • Small business: USD 49 /month
    • Ten social profiles 
  • Agency: USD 79 /month
    • Thirty social profiles 
  • Multi-Location: Customised
    • Customised profiles

Pros

✅White label features

✅Content Library 

✅User Friendly 

Cons

🚫Limited features

🚫Limited integrations
